---
title: Estimation of Instantaneous Frequency Fluctuation in a Fast DVFS Environment
  Using an Empirical BTI Stress-Relaxation Model
author:
- Chen Zhou
- Xiaofei Wang
- Weichao Xu
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
- Chris Kim
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/irps14.pdf
journ: IRPS
year: 2014
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 6
---
